claim: Registry now lists all seven federation programs including centinelas-pr.

claim: Federation status reconciled with OVNIS production state and Centinelas roster.
proof: OVNIS live-exec ⛔→✅ (470 real cases, 0 synthetic); Centinelas node row added; new tests/test_status_consistency.py cross-checks registry status vs status doc vs each producer manifest. make test: 165 passed.
fix_vector: Closes P0-HUB-STATUS-DRIFT-OVNIS; adds the missing status-consistency test.

claim: Native gates executed across all seven repos and consolidated into the Hub control ledger.
proof: Per-repo acceptance gates run locally (ovnis, aguayluz, thehub, centinelas, moneysweep, skywatcher, spiderweb); rows below carry each result. runtime_executed flips from NO to YES for the federation.

claim: Native acceptance gate executed locally (previously runtime_executed=NO in the static audit).

claim: Master case ledger holds real production cases with zero synthetic/placeholder rows.

claim: Production canonical export succeeds and rejects synthetic rows.
proof: manifest package_id=pkg_698815477e425c9e1c08029697599890, mode=production, streams: sources=278, entities=758, relationships=563, observations=470; each file entry carries sha256 + schema_id.
fix_vector: Export contract validated against federation_export_manifest.schema.json shape; discoverable by thehub Hub.

claim: geopandas dependency for build_pr_geo_boundaries.py is now declared and CI-guarded.

claim: Native acceptance gate executed locally.
proof: ruff: all checks passed; pytest: 152 passed; validate_repo.py: no blocking gate failures; smoke_test.py offline: SMOKE PASS.

claim: Live EPA WATERS pointindexing works using the Data.gov X_API_KEY.

claim: Root federation.json now exists and is Hub-schema conformant.

claim: Canonical export adapter produces Hub-valid streams.

claim: CI manifest gate + contract tests added.
proof: validate.yml mirrors the OVNIS manifest gate (grid validate + export --mode test + pytest); pytest: 5 passed; grid validate: PR baseline grid validation passed.

claim: Production promotion blocked pending real signal intake.
proof: Seed ledger is entirely synthetic (is_synthetic=true); production export refused. ready_for_hub_live_execution=false with explicit blocking_conditions.

claim: Native acceptance gate executed locally.
proof: compileall OK; pytest 2049 passed / 6 skipped (coverage 47.71% >= 44% floor); scan_for_secrets 0 findings; validation_gates and canonical_v1_schema both run; canonical_v1 PASS (0 errors).

claim: Live federal intake works against the current environment (keyless source).
proof: OpenFEMA PA v2 download fetched 21,911 real Puerto Rico Public Assistance project records -> data/normalized/fema_pa_projects_v2.parquet (status OK). Note: v2 PublicAssistanceApplicants endpoint now 404s (deprecated); projects dataset unaffected.
fix_vector: Fold materialized federal sources into canonical_v1 to flip required_source_nonempty gates.

claim: Data.gov-family sources now fall back to the shared X_API_KEY.
proof: Added config.get_data_gov_api_key() (DATA_GOV_API_KEY -> X_API_KEY -> DEMO_KEY) and wired download_fta_ntd.py; resolver returns X_API_KEY when DATA_GOV_API_KEY unset. Present keys: CENSUS/FAC/FEC/HIGHERGOV/LDA/SAM/X_API_KEY; OpenStates + FinancialData supplied via files; USAspending + OpenFEMA keyless.
fix_vector: Enables Data.gov-family live pulls without a source-specific key.

claim: ready_for_hub_live_execution remains false: 13 required sources are empty.
proof: validation_gates: 20/124 gates failing. required_source_nonempty empty for usaspending_prime, fsrs_subawards, sam_entities, fema_pa_openfema_v2, cor3, hud_cdbg_dr_public, hud_drgr_authorized, prasa, oficina_contralor, emma_bonds, lda, pr_cabilderos, fec. PR-specific sources (cor3/prasa/oficina_contralor/emma_bonds/pr_cabilderos/hud_drgr) are manual Tranche B / scraper stubs; nonprofits needs PROPUBLICA_API_KEY (absent).
fix_vector: Run the full federal materialization pipeline (usaspending/openfema/sam/fec/lda) into canonical_v1, supply manual Tranche B exports + PROPUBLICA key, then re-run validation_gates.

claim: Production promotion blocked: only the synthetic sample package exists.

claim: Producer->consumer filename drift at the moneysweep->spiderweb intake handoff.
proof: With moneysweep-pr co-located, run_pr_intake_router.py writes moneysweep_derivatives.csv (routing_summary.spiderweb_pr_derivative_count=2), but build_spiderweb_spatial_lane reads spiderweb_pr_derivatives.csv (readiness/spiderweb_spatial_lane.py:35) -> SpiderwebSpatialLaneError missing required input. This test pytest.skips in normal spiderweb CI (moneysweep not a sibling).
fix_vector: HANDOFF BOUNDARY (no-cross-edit): reconcile the derivatives filename between moneysweep run_pr_intake_router.py and spiderweb build_spiderweb_spatial_lane; requires moneysweep-pr coordination, not a unilateral spiderweb edit.
